candidates.name: Goldman Sachs Research
candidates.notes: The report mentions AI investments as a percentage of US GDP, not overall GDP growth. No explicit forecast for overall US GDP growth for 2026 was found in this report.

2026.quote: AI investments may reach ~1.5% of US GDP this year, just below the 1990s tech peak.
